---
title: Wharton 2025 Summer School
subtitle: Structural Estimation in Corporate Finance
author: Hyong-gu Hwang
date: August 5, 2025
---

---


Welcome! This site contains my solutions and notes from the Wharton Summer School project on structural estimation in corporate finance.

<!-- 💼 [Dropbox Course Folder](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fo/eb1kfpv844bqblso1tl94/AFw_OX98l26oShbGX3FDogc?rlkey=iqpwk1l2rwaccn6hnlb8ywdlb&st=fua5lh4v&dl=0) -->

🗓️ [Program Schedule](https://rodneywhitecenter.wharton.upenn.edu/program-schedule/)

Use the top menu bar to navigate to:

- The dynamic model
- Overview of functions
- Project assignments
